codeReview.summary: The fix correctly addresses the missing authentication test for POST /claims (VAL-TEST-018). The new test follows the established pattern used by the existing GET /mine authentication test, using a mock requireSession middleware that returns 401 to verify unauthenticated requests are rejected.

summary: The fix successfully addresses the original blocking issue identified in the prior review. A new test case "should require authentication (401 without session)" was added to the POST / describe block in server/routes/claims.test.ts. The test correctly verifies that POST /claims returns 401 when no session is provided, fulfilling VAL-TEST-018. The implementation follows the established testing patterns in the codebase, with proper use of the itIf conditional test helper and the mock requireSession middleware pattern. All verification steps passed (bun test, tsc, biome).
